name: CV2024 public-validation audit dataset
description: Croissant metadata for the CV2024 public-validation audit released with the paper. The dataset contains derivative metadata only: file paths, labels, perceptual hashes, NCC values, audit annotations, and summary result tables. Image bytes are not redistributed. Users must download the original CV2024 and Kvasir-Capsule corpora from their providers under the providers' current access and license terms.
citeAs: (Anonymized for double-blind review. Replace with the published BibTeX entry on acceptance.)
rai:dataCollection: Derived by applying pHash + dHash over the public Capsule Vision 2024 Challenge release (https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/Capsule_Vision_2024_Challenge/26403469) and the public Kvasir-Capsule dataset (https://datasets.simula.no/kvasir-capsule). No new images were collected; no human labelers were engaged. The audit code and hashes are released for full reproducibility.
rai:dataCollectionType: Secondary use of public datasets (audit / derivative metadata only).
rai:dataAnnotationProtocol: Class labels inherited from the original CV2024 XLSX release (no re-annotation). Near-duplicate flagging is automated via pHash and dHash Hamming distance, with PDQ, pixel NCC, and DINOv2 feature checks released as corroborating metadata. The reported headline claims do not require manual image adjudication.
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol: For each image in Kvasir-Capsule (n=47,238 labeled frames) and CV2024 (n=53,739 frames), we compute 64-bit pHash and 64-bit dHash (imagehash library, hash_size=8). For each CV2024 file we record the minimum Hamming distance to any Kvasir-Capsule frame on each hash. We flag a CV2024 file as a near-duplicate when both Hamming distances are at most 6; this threshold is corroborated in the paper by NCC, PDQ, learned-feature, and threshold-sensitivity checks. Thresholds le 0 (exact) and le 2 (strict near-duplicate) are also provided.
rai:dataReleaseMaintenancePlan: Versioning: every released file is covered by SHA-256 hashes in checksums.txt (except checksums.txt and croissant.json themselves). Future revisions will be published as new versions, and prior versions will remain accessible. Hosting and maintainer contact are anonymized for double-blind review and will be replaced with persistent identifiers on acceptance.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: Underlying Kvasir-Capsule and CV2024 corpora are de-identified capsule-endoscopy frames from medical studies and should be treated as sensitive health data even without direct identifiers. The metadata release adds no patient identifiers; public filenames expose only file/video-level grouping available in the source releases.
rai:dataSocialImpact: Intended to strengthen fair evaluation of capsule-endoscopy classifiers by removing a specific leakage channel (Kvasir-Capsule content in CV2024). Potential misuse: using the le6 filter list as if it were a within-KVASIR-source benchmark would be inappropriate.
rai:dataBiases: The `le6` split is source-imbalanced: SEE-AI dominates (9996/4289 train/val), KID is small (376/165), AIIMS is small (224/97, only Ulcer/Worms classes). Users should report per-source metrics alongside pooled metrics.
rai:dataUseCases: Kvasir-origin-removed CV2024 public-pool evaluation on CV2024; benchmark audit reproducibility; research on perceptual-hash deduplication methodology. The le6 and le6_plus_internal splits are not source-held-out or patient-held-out clinical deployment benchmarks.
rai:dataLimitations: (a) pHash is not robust to center-crops >= 10%; any CV2024 files that are cropped variants of Kvasir frames would be missed. The reported near-duplicate flag rate is conservative for crop variants. (b) We audit selected internal CV2024 train-validation and cross-source near-duplicate channels, but do not claim a complete subject-level/patient-overlap audit or cross-dataset overlaps with KID/SEE-AI own releases. A full rater-adjudicated precision study would tighten the bound.
rai:dataReleaseTimeline: Anonymous artifact released at submission for double-blind review; on acceptance, mirrored to Zenodo with permanent DOI and archival OSF mirror.
rai:dataReleaseAccess: Open access. No gating, registration, or credentials required. Image bytes are not redistributed; users obtain them from the original public providers (CV2024, Kvasir-Capsule) under those providers' terms.

recordSet.name: cv2024_dedup_le6_training
recordSet.description: 10,596 CV2024 training examples after le6 dedup. All 12 columns of the original CV2024 training XLSX are preserved.

field.name: image_path
field.description: Relative path to the CV2024 image.

recordSet.name: cv2024_dedup_le6_validation
recordSet.description: 4,551 CV2024 validation examples after le6 dedup. Same 12-column schema as training.
